name: Nichiwa Sangyo Co., Ltd.
summary: Nichiwa Sangyo Co., Ltd. engages in the manufacture, consignment processing, and brokerage of compound feed products in Japan. The company is also involved in the manufacture and brokerage of livestock and poultry equipment; breeding of livestock and poultry; production, processing, and brokerage of livestock products and related foods; and sale of veterinary drugs, as well as in the brokerage of livestock medical care. Nichiwa Sangyo Co., Ltd. was founded in 1918 and is headquartered in Kobe, Japan.
